_comment: Browser-demo fixture for Step 12 — end-of-experience completion card. Two short audio items so the card mounts within seconds. Uses production-wire `profile_name` + `profile_slug` (P0 fix from FE review of 3d675a6 — production joins users.name/users.slug AS profile_name/profile_slug, NOT creator_name/creator_slug). All three CTAs render (Share + Try Another + What's Next). Load with ?fixture=14-completion-card&debug. Audio is autoplay='muted' for fast playback through both items so the experience:ended event fires + the completion card mounts. Add &bumper=off to skip the network bumper for faster iteration.
name: Demo — Completion Card
description: Two short audio items — watch the end-of-experience card mount.
